title: Pods — Container probes
text:
A
probe
is a diagnostic performed periodically by the kubelet on a container.
To perform a diagnostic, the kubelet can invoke different actions:
ExecAction
(performed with the help of the container runtime)
TCPSocketAction
(checked directly by the kubelet)
HTTPGetAction
(checked directly by the kubelet)
You can read more about
probes
in the Pod Lifecycle documentation.
